posts.title: Solving exp(exp(z)) = 1 on the Complex Plane
posts.text: IntroductionWe want all complex numbers (z\in\mathbb{C}) satisfying $$e^{e^z}=1.$$ Write $$z=x+iy,\quad x,y\in\mathbb{R}.$$ Step 1: Reduce to an equation of the form (e^z = \cdots)If (e^w=1), then $$w=2\pi i k,\quad k\in\mathbb{Z}.$$ Set (w=e^z). Then $$e^z=2\pi i k,\quad k\in\mathbb{Z}.$$ Since (e^z\neq 0), we must have (k\neq 0). So we solve $$e^z=2\pi i k,\quad k\in\mathbb{Z}\setminus{0}.$$ Step 2: Split into real and imaginary partsUsing $$e^z=e^{x+iy}=e^x(\cos y+i\sin y),$$ we get $$e^x\cos y=0,\qquad e^x\sin y=2\pi k.$$ Because (e^x>0), the first equation gives (\cos y=0), hence $$y=\frac\pi2+n\pi,\quad n\in\mathbb{Z}.$$ So (\sin y=\pm1). Case (k>0): need (\sin y=1), so$$y=\frac\pi2+2\pi m,\quad m\in\mathbb{Z},$$and$$x=\ln(2\pi k).$$ Case (k<0): need (\sin y=-1), so$$y=\frac{3\pi}{2}+2\pi m,\quad m\in\mathbb{Z},$$and$$x=\ln(-2\pi k).$$ Final Solution SetTherefore the complete set of solutions is $$z=\ln(2\pi k)+i\left(\frac\pi2+2\pi m\right),\quad k>0,\ k,m\in\mathbb{Z},$$ or $$z=\ln(-2\pi k)+i\left(\frac{3\pi}{2}+2\pi m\right),\quad k<0,\ k,m\in\mathbb{Z}.$$ Equivalent compact form: $$z=\ln(2\pi|k|)+i\big(\arg(ik)+2\pi m\big),\quad k\in\mathbb{Z}\setminus{0},\ m\in\mathbb{Z}.$$ with (\arg(ik)=\frac\pi2) for (k>0), and (\arg(ik)=\frac{3\pi}{2}) for (k<0) (mod (2\pi)).

pages.text: /* Profile widget typography tweaks to get a Lei-Mao-like feel: * - Serif name * - Italic, smaller multi-line title * - Respect YAML newlines via `white-space: pre-line` */ @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,500;0,600;1,400;1,500&display=swap'); /* Only affect the profile card. */ .card.widget[data-type="profile"] { --profile-serif: "Cormorant Garamond", Georgia, "Times New Roman", Times, serif; } /* Name */ .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type p.title { font-family: var(--profile-serif); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.01em; font-size: 1.75rem; /* smaller than default is-size-4 */ line-height: 1.05; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; } /* Title (multi-line) */ .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type p.is-size-6.is-block { font-family: var(--profile-serif); font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.25; white-space: pre-line; /* make YAML newlines render as line breaks */ margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; } /* Location */ .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type p.is-size-6.is-flex { /* Match reference: location is larger and not italic, with normal theme font */ font-family: inherit; font-style: normal; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.2; margin-top: 0; } .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type p.is-size-6.is-flex i { font-size: 1.15em; } /* Center align like the reference screenshot. */ .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type .level-item.has-text-centered { text-align: center !important; } .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type figure.image { margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }
